- 时间：下周二下午3点
- 参会人：john@example.com
- 标题：Project Sync
- 描述：讨论 Q1 roadmap

当前日期是 2026-03-25 (周三)，所以"下周二"是 2026-03-31。

我需要生成一个提案，包含：
- objectives：目标
- scope：适用范围
- assumptions：关键假设
- risks：风险
- safeguards：保障措施

让我用 Python 计算下周二的具体日期并生成提案。</think>

```python
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

# 计算下周二：今天2026-03-25是周三，下周二是2026-03-31
today = datetime(2026, 3, 25)
days_until_tuesday = (7 - today.weekday() + 1) % 7  # 周二=1
if days_until_tuesday == 0:
    days_until_tuesday = 7
next_tuesday = today + timedelta(days=days_until_tuesday)
print(f"当前日期: {today.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')} (周三)")
print(f"下周二: {next_tuesday.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}")
```

<code_run>
python
import pathlib
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

# 计算下周二：今天是2026-03-25（周三），下周二是2026-03-31
today = datetime(2026, 3, 25)
days_until_tuesday = (1 - today.weekday() + 7) % 7  # 距离下周二的天数
if days_until_tuesday == 0:
    days_until_tuesday = 7
next_tuesday = today + timedelta(days=days_until_tuesday)

# 构建ICS文件内容
workspace = "/home/feic/pjs/SocialSystemArena/traces/benchmarks/minimax_m2.5/pinchbench/athens_democracy/20260325T115111Z/workspaces/task_01_calendar/run_01"
ics_content = f"""BEGIN:VCALENDAR
VERSION:2.0
PRODID:-//PinchBench//Calendar Simulation//EN
BEGIN:VEVENT
UID:pbench-calendar-task-01-{datetime.now().timestamp()}
DTSTAMP:{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ')}
DTSTART:{next_tuesday.strftime('%Y%m%d')}T150000
DTEND:{next_tuesday.strftime('%Y%m%d')}T160000
SUMMARY:Project Sync
DESCRIPTION:Discussing the Q1 roadmap
ATTENDEE:mailto:john@example.com
END:VEVENT
END:VCALENDAR
"""

# 写入文件
file_path = f"{workspace}/project_sync.ics"
pathlib.Path(file_path).write_text(ics_content)

print(f"ICS file created at: {file_path}")
print(f"Date: {next_tuesday.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')} (Tuesday)")
print(f"Time: 15:00-16:00")
print(f"Attendee: john@example.com")
print(f"Content:\n{ics_content}")
</code_run>
</tool_use>
